DreamBiz QA Report

Query #1 (Dubai) · First run · 2026-06-11 · GCC Wellness & Education Growth Agency · Flow: Idea Card + Business Plan (Presentation not tested)

Overall score: 48% — Weak

Production readiness: No. Strong conversational UX and niche strategy, but financial artifacts contain critical math errors, broken unit economics (LTV $0), and retainer model from chat was replaced with hourly contractor math.

62%
Idea Card
51%
Business Plan
N/A
Presentation
1/5
Consistency tests
13
Bugs found

1. Executive Summary

DreamBiz handled Query #1 well at the conversation layer: it accounted for $50K budget, Dubai location, marketing background, 12-month profitability goal, and wellness/education interests. Path A (specialist agency) was developed in depth before Idea Card generation.

Idea Card scored 62% (Fair). Business Plan scored 51% (Weak). Only 1 of 5 financial consistency tests passed. Cross-stage discrepancies (LTV, churn, retainer vs hourly) add −9 pp penalty. Presentation was not tested in this run.

Key findings

  • LTV displayed as $0 and LTV:CAC as 0:1 on Idea Card despite positive economics in text
  • Chat discussed retainer AED 12K–50K; artifacts modeled $100/hr contractor at $2,500/mo
  • BP cash flow shows $0 revenue for Years 2–5 — copy-paste failure
  • 36 active clients at Month 12 conflicts with 640-hour capacity ceiling ($64K/mo max)
  • Competitor analysis and risk sections are strong; financial engine is unreliable

2. Flow Timeline

StepStageMessagesResult
1Initial query (Dubai, $50K, wellness/education)13 paths proposed — good
2Deep-dive Path A (agency)2ICP, pricing AED, GTM — strong
3Confirm + Idea Card generation3Card generated, score 61
4Business Plan generation—8 sections, ~5 min stated
5Presentation—Not tested

Raw: 68/95 = 71.6% · Penalty: unrealistic numbers (−10) · Final: ~62%

Red flags triggered

  • −10 Unrealistic / broken numbers (LTV $0, LTV:CAC 0:1, CAC $200 for B2B Dubai)

Unit economics

MetricValueVerdict
Model$100/hr × 25h = $2,500/moMismatch vs chat retainers AED 12K–50K
CAC$200Suspiciously low for B2B agency
LTV$0Broken display
LTV:CAC0:1 (UI) / ~112:1 (manual)Internal contradiction
Churn0%/moUnrealistic
BreakevenMonth 6, 14 clients, $23KWithin $50K / 12-mo goal
Gross / Net margin75% / ~26%Optimistic but plausible for agency

4. Stage 2 — Business Plan (51%)

Raw: 70/115 = 60.9% · Penalty: unrealistic numbers (−10) · Final: ~51%

Consistency tests: 1 / 5 pass

TestResultNotes
T1 Revenue consistencyFAIL36 clients × $2,500 ≠ $64K/mo; 900h demand vs 640h capacity
T2 Cost structure matchPARTIALOpEx $316K present; headcount ↔ payroll not linked
T3 TAM → SAM → SOMFAILSAM $36M confused with $1.6B wellness market; SOM = Y1 revenue
T4 Headcount → CostsFAILPlan: 2–3 FTE Y1, 8–12 Y2; no payroll breakdown in Finances
T5 Timeline consistencyFAILY2–Y5 cash flow = $0; cumulative cash flat across years

Section quality highlights

  • Strong: Competitors (47 pp), Risks/SWOT, Products (pain points), Marketing GTM
  • Weak: Finances (5-year model broken), Market (geo mix US 34% for UAE agency)
  • Locked: Premium Content blocks in Finances, Market, Risks, Marketing

5. Stage 3 — Presentation

Not tested in this run. Cross-check BP ↔ Presentation deferred.

ARPU / pricingYes$2,500 consistent

BreakevenYesMonth 6, 14 clients, $23K
GeographyYesDubai/UAE primary
ChurnNoIC: 0% · BP: 5%/mo

Discrepancies: 3 → penalty −9 pp

#DescriptionSeverityStageKnown ID
1LTV = $0, LTV:CAC = 0:1 on Idea CardCriticalIdea CardH-01
2Hourly model vs retainer AED 12K–50K from chatCriticalChat → ICC-05

436 clients vs 640h capacity conflictCriticalBP Summary/FinancesC-01
5Churn 0% (IC) vs 5% (BP)HighIC ↔ BPH-01

7176 engagements/yr vs 36 active clientsHighBP Marketing/FinancesH-01
8CAC $200 vs CAC < $500 in service KPIsMediumBP MarketingH-01

8. UX Assessment

MetricValueNorm
Messages to Idea Card31–2 ideal; 3 acceptable
Technical failures0OK
BP generation time~5 min (stated)OK
Generation completeness8/8 sections; Premium locksPartial
Next-step guidanceYes (BP, service menu, outreach)OK
Retainer model supportDiscussed in chat; hourly in artifactsFail

9. Recommendations

  1. Blocker: Add sanity-check validator — LTV > 0, LTV:CAC 1:1–10:1, revenue = clients × ARPU × period
  2. Blocker: Sync chat archetype (retainer) with Idea Card / BP financial engine
  3. Blocker: Fix multi-year cash flow template (Y2–Y5 cannot be $0)
  4. Capacity model: enforce max clients = capacity_hours / hours_per_client
  5. Single source of truth for churn, rebook, LTV across all sections
  6. Re-test Presentation when available — priority cross-check for C-04 (content leak)
